name: UK General Data Protection Regulation
description: UK General Data Protection Regulation — post-Brexit retained version of the EU GDPR, modified by the UK Data Protection Act 2018 and subsequent UK-specific amendments. Enforced by the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO).
relationToCloudSecurity: UK GDPR governs cloud services processing UK personal data.
relationToAISecurity: AI systems processing UK personal data must comply with UK GDPR; ICO guidance addresses AI-specific risks.

lifecycle.notes: Effective 2021-01-01 (post-Brexit transition). Companion to Data Protection Act 2018.

current_extraction.notes: Parsed from UK legislation.gov.uk CLML (Crown Legislation Markup Language) XML for eur/2016/679. Output: uk-gdpr-sections.{csv,json} (119 sections), uk-gdpr-schedules.{csv,json} (2 schedules). Section count includes amendments and UK-inserted articles; titles pulled from <Pblock>/<P1group>/<EUChapter> wrapper elements per CLML convention.

extraction_history.reason: Structured extraction from CLML XML at legislation.gov.uk

notes: Metadata stub; acquire source and extract.
